name: 96-Well Plate Planner
description: Interactive 96-well plate planner for laboratory experiments. Plan, visualize, and export your plate layouts.

icons.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 192 192'><rect fill='%237F77DD' width='192' height='192'/><text x='50%' y='50%' font-size='90' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' font-weight='bold'>96</text></svg>

data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 512 512'><rect fill='%237F77DD' width='512' height='512'/><text x='50%' y='50%' font-size='240' fill='white' text-anchor='middle' dominant-baseline='central' font-family='Arial, sans-serif' font-weight='bold'>96</text></svg>

screenshots.src: data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 540 720'><rect fill='%23f8f8f8' width='540' height='720'/><rect fill='%23ffffff' x='20' y='20' width='500' height='680' rx='8'/><text x='30' y='60' font-size='24' fill='%237F77DD' font-family='Arial' font-weight='bold'>96-Well Plate Planner</text><rect fill='%23f0f4ff' x='30' y='80' width='480' height='100' rx='4'/><text x='40' y='140' font-size='14' fill='%23555' font-family='Arial'>Click to select sample type and assign wells</text></svg>
